Class WorkoutRoutineDAO.CompletedWorkoutData

java.lang.Object
com.lockedin.lockedin.model.dao.WorkoutRoutineDAO.CompletedWorkoutData
Enclosing class:
WorkoutRoutineDAO
public static class WorkoutRoutineDAO.CompletedWorkoutData extends Object
Provides completed workout data functionality for LockedIn.
Version:
1.0
Author:
LockedIn Team

      public CompletedWorkoutData(int id, int routineId, String routineName, String completedAt, int totalExercises, int totalSets, List<WorkoutRoutineDAO.CompletedSetData> sets)

      totalSets - The total sets.
